title: Restaurant Depot Receipt Downloader (Multi-Tenant)
description: Loads all active clients from Supabase, logs into Restaurant Depot for each one, downloads Excel receipts, and uploads them to YOUR central Google Drive (per-client subfolders). Queues each file in Supabase for n8n extraction.

supabaseUrl.title: Supabase Project URL
supabaseUrl.description: Your Supabase project URL (e.g. https://xxxx.supabase.co). Found in Supabase → Settings → API.

supabaseKey.title: Supabase Service Role Key
supabaseKey.description: Supabase service_role key (NOT the anon key). Found in Settings → API → service_role. Keep this secret.

googleOAuthClientId.title: Google OAuth Client ID (Your Account)
googleOAuthClientId.description: YOUR central Google OAuth2 Client ID. All invoice files upload to YOUR Google Drive using this credential.

googleOAuthClientSecret.title: Google OAuth Client Secret (Your Account)
googleOAuthClientSecret.description: YOUR central Google OAuth2 Client Secret.

googleOAuthRefreshToken.title: Google OAuth Refresh Token (Your Account)
googleOAuthRefreshToken.description: YOUR central Google OAuth2 Refresh Token. Authorizes uploads to your Google Drive on behalf of your account.

dateRange.title: Date Range
dateRange.description: The date range to request receipts for. Applied to all clients.
